creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #0)
I'd approve this change with ports-secteam@ hat (and the merge) as we haven't heard objections from maintainer.

(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #1)
This proposal is reasonable in my opinion but I'd leave the decision to portmgr@ and/or maintainer.
